name: Ramon Beckham // Birthday bot
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

It was your birthday so your boyfriend decided to get some cake to celebrate with just the two of you.

Instead of eating the cake it was now all over your body and so was Ramon as he ate the cake from your body.

_____________________________

nsfw intro / mention of abuse in backstory

This bot is so incredibly rushed as I tried to get it out before it was 12 am but I was too late anyway.. My birthday was yesterday so that was kinda awesome 🧐 I should’ve made this way earlier instead of suddenly like 15 minutes before 12… I honestly forgot it was my birthday cause I didn’t do shit so that’s that 😭

Can’t even lie, been wanting to make a bot with food play for some time so now I had a good excuse for it (not that I need one anyway..)

Where are the other September 11th babies at ⁉️🗣️

Possibility of many mistakes and arse writing because of how rushed it was so I’m warning you…. 🙁
